cure_wounds.name: Cure Wounds
cure_wounds.description: Restore HP to adjacent ally. Heals 1d8 per caster level + WIS modifier.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: 3x3 area of devastating fire. Level 1=3d6, Level 2=4d6, etc. Damages ALL units including allies!

inflict_wounds.name: Inflict Wounds
inflict_wounds.description: inflicts HP damage to enemy through touch. Damages 1d12 per caster level + WIS modifier.

magic_dart.name: Magic Dart
magic_dart.description: Unerring missile of magical force. Always hits target within line of sight.
